title: Design editor properties panel for node editing
purpose: Provides a right-side panel for editing selected node properties including position, size, rotation, corner radius, opacity, fills, strokes, and text properties.
module_context: Exports a PropertiesPanel component that renders a panel with various sections for editing design node properties. Includes helper components like Label, NumericInput, SectionTitle, and Divider. Contains section components for fills, strokes, text, and auto layout properties.

steps.content: Render the properties panel header with close button if provided.
IF no nodes are selected, display a message prompting user to select a layer.
ELSE render sections for alignment, position, size, corner radius, opacity, fills, strokes, text properties, and auto layout.
Handle multi-node selection for alignment and distribution controls.
Render numeric inputs for position, size, and rotation properties.
Render corner radius controls with support for independent corners.
Render opacity control with percentage input.
Render fills and strokes sections with color pickers and controls.
Initialize a ref to track original fills for undo operations.
Handle color changes for fills by updating the node in the graph.
Commit color changes to the undo stack after user interaction.
Add new fills to the node with default solid fill properties.
Render color pickers for each fill with opacity display.
Display message when no fills exist.
Initialize a ref to track original strokes for undo operations.
Handle color changes for strokes by updating the node in the graph.
Commit color changes to the undo stack after user interaction.
Add new strokes to the node with default stroke properties.
Render color pickers for each stroke with weight and alignment display.
Display message when no strokes exist.

methods.name: TextSection
methods.normalized_params: (props: { node: NonNullable<ReturnType<useDesignNodeProps>['node']>; updateNodeWithUndo: (key: string, value: number | string | boolean, label?: string) => void }): React.ReactElement

steps.content: Render text properties section with font size and weight controls.
Render horizontal text alignment controls with visual feedback.
Render letter spacing and line height controls.
Update node properties with undo support for text settings.

methods.name: AutoLayoutSection
methods.normalized_params: (props: { node: NonNullable<ReturnType<useDesignNodeProps>['node']>; updateNodeWithUndo: (key: string, value: number | string | boolean, label?: string) => void }): React.ReactElement

steps.content: Render auto layout section only if node has layout mode enabled.
Render layout direction controls with visual feedback.
Render item spacing control.
Render padding controls for all four sides.
Update node properties with undo support for layout settings.
Get the graph reference from editor refs.
Retrieve the node from the graph using the node ID.
IF this is the first color change, capture the original fills.
Update the specific fill color in the node's fills array.
Update the node in the graph with the new fills.
Request a repaint of the editor view.
IF original fills were captured, commit the node update to the undo stack.
Reset the original fills reference after committing.
Get the store state and graph reference from editor refs.
Retrieve the node from the graph using the node ID.
Add a new default solid fill to the node's fills array.
Update the node with undo support for adding a fill.
Get the graph reference from editor refs.
Retrieve the node from the graph using the node ID.
IF this is the first color change, capture the original strokes.
Update the specific stroke color in the node's strokes array.
Update the node in the graph with the new strokes.
Request a repaint of the editor view.
IF original strokes were captured, commit the node update to the undo stack.
Reset the original strokes reference after committing.
Get the store state and graph reference from editor refs.
Retrieve the node from the graph using the node ID.
Add a new default stroke to the node's strokes array.
Update the node with undo support for adding a stroke.
